materials.name: TMT Fe500D (EAF / scrap-based)
materials.description: Illustrative lower-carbon rebar tier (EAF route, higher scrap share). Values are mock ranges for comparison—not mill certificates.

materials.name: PSC 53 (Portland Slag Cement)
materials.description: Slag-blended cement—typically lower clinker factor than pure OPC. Mock ₹/bag-equivalent and kgCO₂e/kg for educational comparison.

materials.name: Rockwool curtain wall pack 100mm
materials.description: High-density rock wool for façade cavities. Mock façade-area pricing and embodied carbon per m² installed.

materials.name: DGU Low-E 6+12Ar+6 (curtain wall)
materials.description: Insulating glass unit for commercial façades. Mock supply rates and cradle-to-gate–style carbon intensity per m² of glazing.

materials.name: Manufactured sand (M-sand) Zone II
materials.description: Crushed-rock manufactured sand replacing river sand in concrete. Typical lower logistics variability than very remote river sand.

materials.name: FSC-certified structural plywood 19mm
materials.description: Certified plywood for formwork and finishes. Mock ₹/m³ and biogenic/fossil carbon simplified to a single intensity for the app.
